'''zashogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pygarg|pygarg]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-sh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pygarg|pygarg]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zashogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || zæshegeth || zæshegej || zæshegesh || zæshege
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || zashoshogoth || zashoshogoj || zashoshogosh || zashoshogo
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || zashogoth || zashogoj || zashogosh || zashogo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || zashofgofth || zashofgofj || zashofgofsh || zashofgof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || zashogotho || zashogojo || zashogosho || zashogoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || zashogoth || zashogoj || zashogosh || zashogo
|-
| [[Possessive]] || zashogothol || zashogojol || zashogoshol || zashogokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || zashogoothotho || zashogoojojo || zashogooshosho || zashogooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || zashogothon || zashogojon || zashogoshon || zashogokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || zashogothooro || zashogojooro || zashogoshooro || zashogokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
